category_sources: source_facts.description says kubeseal is a Kubernetes controller and tool for one-way encrypted Secrets; official Sealed Secrets README describes the controller and client utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kubeseal; official Sealed Secrets README identifies kubeseal as the client-side utility.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation for Sealed Secrets and kubeseal installation, usage, scopes, rotation, and FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/bitnami-labs/sealed-secrets, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions encrypted Secrets; official README explains Sealed Secrets, the controller, the kubeseal utility, and asymmetric crypto encryption.
